title: How Great Thou Art

tokens.lyric: O Lord my God, when I in awesome wonder

lines.raw: [A]O Lord my God, when I in awesome wonder[A7]

tokens.lyric: Consider a
ll the wor
ld Thy hands have mad
e,

lines.raw: Consider a[D]ll the wor[E7]ld Thy hands have mad[A]e,

tokens.lyric: I see the stars, I hear t
he rolling thunde
r,

lines.raw: I see the stars, I hear t[A7]he rolling thunde[D]r,

tokens.lyric: Thy pow'r thro'
out the universe di
splayed.

lines.raw: Thy pow'r thro'[E7]out the universe di[A]splayed.

tokens.lyric: Then sings my soul, my Savior
God to Thee

lines.raw: Then sings my soul, my Savior[D] God to Thee[A]:

tokens.lyric: How great Thou art,
how great Thou art!

lines.raw: How great Thou art, [E7]how great Thou art![A]

tokens.lyric: Then sings my soul, my Sav
ior God, to Thee

lines.raw: Then sings my soul, my Sav[D]ior God, to Thee[A];

tokens.lyric: How great Thou art,
how great Thou art

lines.raw: How great Thou art, [E7]how great Thou art[A]!

tokens.lyric: When thro' the woods and forest glades I wander

lines.raw: When thro' the woods and forest glades I wander

tokens.lyric: And hear the birds sing sweetly in the trees,

lines.raw: And hear the birds sing sweetly in the trees,

tokens.lyric: When I look down from lofty mountain grandeur,

lines.raw: When I look down from lofty mountain grandeur,

tokens.lyric: And hear the brook and feel the gentle breeze.

lines.raw: And hear the brook and feel the gentle breeze.

tokens.lyric: And when I think that God, His Son not sparing,

lines.raw: And when I think that God, His Son not sparing,

tokens.lyric: Had to let him die, I scarce can take it in,

lines.raw: Had to let him die, I scarce can take it in,

tokens.lyric: That on the cross, his burden fully bearing,

lines.raw: That on the cross, his burden fully bearing,

tokens.lyric: He bled and died to make a way to Him.

lines.raw: He bled and died to make a way to Him.

tokens.lyric: When Christ shall come with shout of acclamation

lines.raw: When Christ shall come with shout of acclamation

tokens.lyric: And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart!

lines.raw: And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart!

tokens.lyric: Then I shall bow in humble adoration,

lines.raw: Then I shall bow in humble adoration,

tokens.lyric: And there proclaim, my God, how great Thou art.

lines.raw: And there proclaim, my God, how great Thou art.
